description: Develop and modify PLC and HMI programs for industrial automation systems based on operational requirements, including inverter setup and parameter adjustment. Perform troubleshooting and debugging on control panels, sensors, actuators, and other field devices to ensure system reliability and stable machine operation. Support electrical wiring and integration for PLC, HMI, and industrial control components, as well as assist in machine commissioning, testing, and system startup during installation and modification projects. Conduct preventive and corrective maintenance activities for automation equipment while analyzing system issues to minimize downtime and improve operational efficiency.

Responsible for troubleshooting and repairing electronic components such as sensors, lamps, power supplies, and industrial electronic devices used in production machines. Performed inspection, preventive maintenance, and spare part replacement to ensure machines operated efficiently and reliably. Assisted in modifying Human Machine Interface (HMI) systems, including monitor replacement and upgrading obsolete components with newer systems. Conducted PLC wiring and electrical connections between control systems and production machines based on industrial standards. Supported maintenance activities for industrial PCs and manufacturing equipment, while also preparing maintenance reports and documenting machine repair activities to support operational monitoring and reduce downtime.
